en: If your company is required to comply with Austria's Social Security requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).

All employers in Austria are required to register their employees for social security coverage, which includes health, pension, and accident insurance. These requirements are established under the Social Insurance Organisation Act and are primarily overseen by the Federal Ministry of Labour, Social Affairs, Health, Care and Consumer Protection. \n
Is your company required to comply with Austria's Social Security requirements maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Austria's Social Security requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Austria.

The company has foreign employee(s) working temporarily (less than 24 months) in Austria that are covered by the home country's scheme and are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate(s) upon request.
